_meta.name: CLM r5 full training launch state — 2026-04-20
_meta.purpose: dest1_clm P2 substrate launch; dual-track parallel with ALM r11
_meta.prior_state: shared/state/clm_r5_parallel_20260420.json (UNBLOCKED on CPU BLAS, gated on r5-a6.5 for GPU)

state_reason: 1B target INFEASIBLE on all currently-viable hosts. Launched 170M r5 full on hetzner CPU BLAS as interim dest1_clm substrate. Full 1B gated on r5-a6.5 libhxcuda dispatch + GPU host availability.

launch_decision_audit.original_target: CLM 1B r5 full (1.51B params, bf16, 50000 steps)
launch_decision_audit.decision: DOWNGRADED to CLM 170M r5 full (106M params, 20000 steps)
rationale: 1B hetzner CPU smoke (batch=2 seq=512): RSS peaked at 81GB/128GB + swap 34GB/63GB — thrashing confirmed, OOM risk on 20K+ step run

Ubuntu RTX 5070: 11.5GB VRAM available BUT (a) no ~/Dev/anima clone, (b) no libhxblas.so / libhxlmhead.so built under ~/Dev/hexa-lang/self/native/build/, (c) trainer has ZERO CUDA call sites — would still CPU-pin on 16GB system RAM. Blocked on r5-a6.5 libhxcuda dispatch.
New H100 pod: REJECTED — 2-pod cap (87xscivuggrwvk ALM r11 running, hhzla1nxmp5019 exited). Also trainer has no CUDA path — $ burn for zero GPU engagement.
170M hetzner CPU BLAS: CONFIRMED feasible. 3-step smoke RSS ~13GB (10.5% of 128GB), steady-state ~90s/step at 243%% CPU multi-core BLAS.
feedback_safe_path_auto + feedback_auto_recommend + feedback_no_ask_just_do: take the working path now, document 1B blocker for follow-up.

host.chosen: hetzner (157.180.8.154, AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D, 128GB RAM, 32 cores, no GPU)
host.reason: Only host where trainer binary runs with multi-core BLAS engaged AND memory fits model+optimizer working set

substrate.honors_policy: feedback_no_resume_data_change — step 0 cold start, no prior params

run.save_every_rationale: CLI override forced — config default 100 too frequent (6-min text-format save each); reduced to 2 saves over run (step 10000, 20000) to keep disk budget + wall-clock under control

step0_metrics.clm_p4_2_gate_phi_holo_gt_500: DEPRECATED_PHANTOM — absolute 500 gate trivially met at random init (raw MI 0.00142 × N=393216 = 558; N-independent gate required)

clm_p4_2_gate_phi_holo_ratio.status: PENDING — evaluate at step_3000 / step_10000 / step_20000 when per-step phi_holo logging restored (r5-a10 followup)

first_3_steps.note: hexa println multi-arg bug masks step 1/2 log lines; only step=0 emits via explicit str() concat path (a63a0393 fix)
first_3_steps.followup: r5-a10 candidate: retrofit _holo_log_line() helper to use str() concat for every println currently using variadic form (approx 6 call sites in train loop)

eta.wall_clock_note: CPU-only on hetzner — very slow. Acceptable as DEST1_CLM P2 stub substrate ONLY. r5-a6.5 + GPU host will cut this ~100x.

blocker_for_1b.desc: libhxcuda.so dispatch behind HXBLAS_CUDA=1 env flag; mirror Mac Metal path; add @link("hxcuda") call sites in train_clm.hexa decoder_forward/backward matmul paths
blocker_for_1b.blocks: 1B / 3B / 7B training on any GPU host (ubu RTX 5070 OR H100 pod)
followup_order: r5-a8: rsync anima + libs to ubu, smoke 1-step with HXBLAS_CUDA=1
r5-a9: 1B full launch on ubu (preferred) or fresh H100 if ubu VRAM insufficient
r5-a10: retrofit println multi-arg → str() concat across train_clm.hexa

phi_vec_laws_attachment.phi_vec_status_at_launch: stub (phi_cache_load skipped) — r5-a10 follow-up to wire real cache emit
phi_vec_laws_attachment.an11_gate_status: PARTIAL — step 0 phi_holo=558.583 (baseline locked); absolute >500 gate deprecated phantom (N-dependent). Ratio gate phi_holo(N)/phi_holo(0) >= 1.2 PENDING multi-step telemetry (r5-a10 per-step logging). phi_vec per-step emission also pending r5-a10.

safety_checks.one_shot_best: CPU path is compromised but optimal within CPU-BLAS envelope

next_checkpoints: T+75h (approx): step 10000 ckpt — eval_ce + phi_holo check
T+250h (approx): step 20000 ckpt — final substrate, R2 upload, dest1_clm AN11 probe
PARALLEL: author r5-a6.5 libhxcuda.so dispatch in anima/docs + land in training/train_clm.hexa — unblocks 1B real launch

revision_history.event: initial launch CLI had --save-every 5000 == CLI default → config.save_every=100 overrode → ckpt flood. KILLED, cleaned.
relaunched with --save-every 10000 (!= CLI default) to force CLI-precedence. 2 saves total.
